title: Verify replay-safe mutation contract
preconditions: Create Draft and Activate Plan Revision inputs plus repeat, conflicting-key, and interruption points before and after durable commit are available.
steps: Invoke the relevant Public Budget Operations and exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-IDEMPOTENT-MUTATIONS, including its validation, lifecycle, compatibility, authority, replay, and unavailable paths where applicable.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-IDEMPOTENT-MUTATIONS holds; all documented errors are stable; every rejected or failed mutation leaves the required prior state unchanged; no prohibited side effect occurs.
